offer: Specialist and overflow 3D production for Bluecadet's museum, cultural and visitor-experience projects. IOM can support projects with optimized real-time models, interactive Three.js environments, architectural visualization, photogrammetry, virtual reconstruction, 360-degree media, browser-based 3D modules and custom presentation tools.
company_focus: Experience-design studio combining design, technology and storytelling for museums, cultural institutions, universities, mission-driven organizations and brands. Its work spans interactive media, digital products, websites and experiences in physical spaces.
notes: High-priority partnership prospect. Bluecadet already has strong design and technology capabilities, so the offer should focus on specialized production capacity rather than general experience design. Rob Hassler is currently listed by Bluecadet as Director of Strategic Partnerships. The public general inquiry email should be used because no verified direct public work email was found. Sources: https://www.bluecadet.com/about, https://www.bluecadet.com/contact, https://www.linkedin.com/company/bluecadet-interactive
initial_email_body:
Hi Rob,

I recently spent some time looking through Bluecadet's museum, cultural and interactive work and wanted to introduce IOM — Interactive Object Media.

IOM is a small creative and technical studio focused on interactive 3D software, browser-based Three.js experiences, optimized real-time environments, architectural visualization, photogrammetry and 360-degree virtual experiences.

My work includes preparing complex models for browser delivery, creating interactive environments, reconstructing spaces from photographic or architectural material and developing custom tools for presenting 3D content. I also develop the IOM 3D Viewer, a browser and desktop platform for publishing and exploring optimized models.

I am approaching Bluecadet as a potential specialist production partner rather than as a competing experience-design studio. IOM could support your team when a project needs additional capacity for a 3D environment, virtual reconstruction, architectural model, photogrammetry component, 360-degree experience or technically demanding browser-based module.

An overview of my current work is available at:
https://iobjectm.com/

I would be happy to send a focused selection of relevant examples and learn how Bluecadet normally collaborates with independent technical specialists.

Would you be open to a brief introductory conversation?

Best regards,

Mirjan Čubrić
IOM — Interactive Object Media
